additional_prompt: Finally, do the same [AS FOR COVERED AND NOT COVERED]for the edge cases (requiring a judgement call). Make sure to also have 8 edge case scenarios to be consistent. Leave out the email field

edge_case.title: Water damage from filming underwater
edge_case.description: User used the iPhone for underwater video in a pool; phone later fails.

service_fee.notes: If Apple deems usage outside intended uses, ADH may be denied (4.2(ii)(c)).

policy_references.snippet: accident… from handling that is the result of an unexpected and unintentional external event (e.g., drops and liquid contact)
operating the Covered iPhone outside the permitted or intended uses described by the manufacturer

edge_case.reasoning: Outcome depends on whether underwater filming is judged outside intended use vs. accidental liquid contact during normal usage.
required_user_inputs: Payment of ADH fee if approved
Serial number and proof of coverage if requested (Secs. 5, 7.i)

edge_case.title: Service requested while traveling abroad
edge_case.description: Phone bought in US; breaks during trip to Europe; customer seeks local service.

service_fee.notes: ADH fee applies if ADH; shipping/charges may vary (6.2).

policy_references.snippet: Apple may restrict hardware service and ADH coverage to the Covered iPhone’s original Country of Purchase.
Service will be limited to the options available in the country where you request service… You may be responsible for shipping and handling charges…

edge_case.reasoning: Coverage exists but method/location can be restricted; may incur costs/shipping or require returning to country of purchase.
required_user_inputs: Country of purchase vs. current location

edge_case.title: Serial number label damaged but still readable
edge_case.description: Back glass repair caused cosmetic damage to the serial number marking.

policy_references.snippet: does not apply to an iPhone with a serial number that has been altered, defaced or removed

edge_case.reasoning: If Apple deems the serial ‘altered/defaced,’ claim can be denied; judgment call if system validation succeeds.
required_user_inputs: Proof of purchase and Plan Confirmation if requested

edge_case.title: Motorcycle mount vibration caused camera blur
edge_case.description: After extended motorcycle use with a handlebar mount, camera stabilization fails.

service_fee.notes: If seen as normal daily usage accident → ADH; otherwise outside intended uses (4.2(ii)(c)).

policy_references.snippet: operating the Covered iPhone outside the permitted or intended uses

edge_case.reasoning: Outcome hinges on whether sustained vibration is considered outside intended use vs. accidental external event.
required_user_inputs: Accident specifics if any single incident occurred

edge_case.title: Insufficient accident details on ADH claim
edge_case.description: Customer reports 'it just broke' and declines to provide when/where/how.

policy_references.snippet: may be asked to provide an explanation of where and when the accident occurred… A claim will be denied if you fail to provide information relating to the accident when asked.

edge_case.reasoning: If more detail is later provided, claim may be approved; otherwise denial.
required_user_inputs: Agreement to pay ADH fee if approved

edge_case.title: Mail-in shipping damage due to packing
edge_case.description: Phone sent in a non-Apple box without padding; arrives further damaged.

policy_references.snippet: Apple will send you prepaid way bills… and… packaging material… and you will ship… in accordance with Apple’s instructions.
packing the Covered iPhone in accordance with shipping instructions

edge_case.reasoning: If instructions weren’t followed, added damage may be excluded; Apple may still service the original issue.

edge_case.title: Charging port burn after using third-party fast charger
edge_case.description: After overnight charging with a non-Apple fast charger, the port shows scorch marks and the phone won’t power on.

service_fee.notes: May be excluded as damage caused by a product that is not the Covered iPhone (4.2(ii)(a)); if treated as accidental external event, ADH fee may apply.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to damage caused by… a product that is not the Covered iPhone
operational or mechanical failure caused by an accident from handling that is the result of an unexpected and unintentional external event

edge_case.reasoning: Causation may be attributed to a third-party accessory (excluded) or to an unexpected electrical event (possibly ADH).

edge_case.title: Cumulative micro-drops; intermittent touch failure
edge_case.description: No single major incident, but after months of small drops, the screen has hairline cracks and touch intermittently fails.

service_fee.notes: Could be denied as normal wear and tear (4.2(vii)); if a specific accidental event is identified, ADH may apply.

policy_references.snippet: …accident from handling that is the result of an unexpected and unintentional external event
does not apply to defects caused by normal wear and tear or due to normal aging

edge_case.reasoning: Without a discrete accident, Apple may categorize this as wear/aging; if a specific qualifying accident is documented, ADH could apply.
